content:
# Shrimp

**Summary**: A high-resolution ion microprobe used for in-situ analysis of minerals.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024]] applied the SHRIMP method to identify ages using U-Pb sensitive high-resolution ion micro-probe.

- [[2024-sulistyohariyanto|Sulistyohariyanto, 2024]] used U-Pb SHRIMP dating to constrain the ages of granitoids in the Al-Ghurayyah pluton.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2024-sulistyohariyanto|Sulistyohariyanto, 2024]] used U-Pb SHRIMP dating to constrain the ages of granitoids in the Al-Ghurayyah pluton.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The study utilizes SHRIMP to provide high-resolution age data for zircon crystals. ([[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024, p. 28]])

- U-Pb SHRIMP dating of zircons provides an age of 647 ± 9.3 Ma to 635 Ma. ([[2024-sulistyohariyanto|Sulistyohariyanto, 2024, p. 15]])
